title: thymus × bractichina
intro: Thymus × bractichina, also known as Thymus × britannicus, is a sterile hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the wild thyme (Thymus polytrichus) and the marsh thyme (Thymus polytrichus subsp. polytrichus). It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of essential oils, which have antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thymus × bractichina include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Thymus × bractichina can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
